_comment: Aqueduct topics file (curated by hand). Edit, then run: aqueduct harvest --topics topics.example.json. Each list entry is one search. Empty string = enrich from already-landed data (pdb/ensembl/bindingdb). Keep uniprot before pdb/ensembl/bindingdb. The harvest also self-expands: after each build it mines corpus insights (undrugged-but-structurally-studied targets, frequent terms, drugs lacking papers) into new queries written to a sibling <name>.generated.json, which harvest merges in automatically. Run `aqueduct suggest --dry-run` to preview, or delete entries from the generated file to drop them.
_patents_comment: Patent sources (all land into 'documents'). surechembl is KEYLESS (EMBL-EBI chemical patents): empty string '' enriches from the ChEMBL/PubChem compounds already landed -> the patents disclosing them (one ~7-8 min remote Parquet join per run, capped by SURECHEMBL_MAX_PATENTS). epo_ops needs EPO_OPS_KEY+EPO_OPS_SECRET (free at developers.epo.org); google_patents needs the `bq` CLI + a GCP project; patents needs PATENTSVIEW_API_KEY. Add queries to epo_ops/google_patents (and a key) to enable them.
